name: The West Stands
description:
You are standing in the northern-most end of the West Stands.  This is
probably the worst location in WarDome to view the game, but the best place to
eye the hometown cheerleaders.  The West Stands continue to the south, to the
north is the northwest corner of WarDome.

extra_descriptions.description:
This group of blondes, brunettes, and redheads is one of the most stunning
you have ever seen.  These are the best that New Sparta has to offer.  It is
just too bad you can't get a closer look (at least not from here).
